title: oreogrammitis kinabaluensis
intro: Oreogrammitis kinabaluensis is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to the island of Borneo, particularly in the state of Sabah, Malaysia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis kinabaluensis include its potential in reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, infusions, or decoctions, and is commonly combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
